title: Workflow Metadata Schema
description: Schema for multi-agent workflow metadata including cost tracking and execution details. The root type is WorkflowMetadata; AgentCostBreakdown is a component definition.
$comment: v3.1.0 is the workflow metadata shape that renamed AgentCostBreakdown.model to model_used, requires AgentCostBreakdown.total_tokens, and flattens WorkflowMetadata token/cost totals onto the root object.

AgentCostBreakdown.title: Agent Cost Breakdown
AgentCostBreakdown.description: Cost and token usage breakdown for a single agent in a workflow

agent_name.description: Name or identifier of the agent

input_tokens.description: Number of input tokens consumed by this agent

output_tokens.description: Number of output tokens generated by this agent

input_cost.description: Cost of input tokens in USD

output_cost.description: Cost of output tokens in USD

total_cost.description: Total cost for this agent (input_cost + output_cost)

WorkflowMetadata.title: Workflow Metadata
WorkflowMetadata.description: Metadata for a multi-agent workflow execution

workflow_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow execution

agent_breakdowns.description: Cost and token breakdown for each agent in the workflow

total_input_tokens.description: Sum of input tokens across all agents

total_output_tokens.description: Sum of output tokens across all agents

total_tokens.description: Sum of total tokens across all agents (total_input_tokens + total_output_tokens)

total_input_cost.description: Sum of input costs across all agents in USD

total_output_cost.description: Sum of output costs across all agents in USD

total_cost.description: Total cost across all agents in USD (total_input_cost + total_output_cost)
